# Andrew Pizzeria — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Andrew Pizzeria is a pizza restaurant located at 150 Madison Street in Oneida, New York. The business is looking to establish an online presence that supports food ordering and showcases multiple store locations, suggesting a growing local or regional pizza brand.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Find restaurants open on Thanksgiving at Andrew Pizzeria in Oneida, NY. Savor handcrafted pizzas with Michelin-star flair. Order now and taste the tradition!

### Locations
https://example.com/locations
Explore Andrew Pizzeria locations for a Great Wall Chinese Restaurant twist on pizza near you. Find open eateries and plan your visit. Your table awaits!

### Ordering App
https://example.com/ordering-app
Use the Andrew Pizzeria ordering app for effortless takeout. Get restaurants open on Thanksgiving specials and CN Tower Restaurant-inspired pies delivered fast!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Contact Andrew Pizzeria to book a table or inquire about Great Wall Chinese Restaurant-style pizza in Oneida. We&#39;re open for Thanksgiving—reach out today!

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Andrew Pizzeria
Andrew Pizzeria is a pizza restaurant located at 150 Madison Street in Oneida, New York. The business is looking to establish an online presence that supports food ordering and showcases multiple store locations, suggesting a growing local or regional pizza brand.

## Services/Products
- pizza ordering
- multiple store locations

## Target Audience
- Busy Families
- College Students
- Urban Professionals

## Industry
Restaurant

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
